# callbacks()

**Instance Method**

Returns the authorization callbacks structure with which this instance was initialized.

## Declaration

```swift
func callbacks() -> UnsafePointer<AuthorizationCallbacks>!
```

## Return Value

An object of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/AuthorizationCallbacks].

## Discussion

Use the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/AuthorizationCallbacks] structure to get the function pointers to functions such as `SetResult` and `SetContextValue`.

## Getting Instance Information

- **engineRef()**: Returns the authorization engine handle with which this instance was initialized.
- **lastError()**: Returns the last error that occurred during evaluation.
